title: Stick To Netherite
description: A simple modification that transforms a stick into a Netherite Ingot through crafting.
body:
# -=Stick To Netherite=-
 

## What does this mod add?
This mod simply turns a stick into a Netherite Ingot.
 

This modification was made mainly for people who have difficulty finding Netherites.

 

## Requires:
Minecraft Forge/Fabric/Neoforge (depends on the version chosen)

 

## Recipe:
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/682deb80f5c10c7b1c64d368417acc605ce0dc0d_0.webp)
